queries.question: Give me the departments corresponding to each news agency.
queries.sql: SELECT Departments.department_name  from News_Agencies_Departments join Departments on News_Agencies_Departments.department_id = Departments.department_id join News_Agencies on News_Agencies_Departments.agency_id = News_Agencies.id   GROUP BY News_Agencies_Departments.department_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT News_Agencies_Departments.agency_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  News_Agencies)

queries.question: Give me the departments corresponding to each news agency.
queries.sql: select news_agencies.name , departments.department_name from News_Agencies_Departments join Departments on News_Agencies_Departments.department_id = Departments.department_id join News_Agencies on News_Agencies_Departments.agency_id = News_Agencies.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?department_name WHERE {
  ?news_agencies_departments a :News_Agencies_Departments .
  ?departments a :Departments .
  ?news_agencies_departments p:hasDepartments ?departments .
  ?news_agencies a :News_Agency .
  ?news_agencies_departments p:hasNews_Agencies ?news_agencies .
  ?news_agencies p:name ?name .
  ?departments p:department_name ?department_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the departments corresponding to each news agency.
